title: Repair persistent Chronik WGX smoke baseline
goal: Restore a deterministic green WGX smoke on Chronik main by fixing the tracked profile parser or profile contract without weakening unsafe-assignment rejection or hiding unrelated failures.

acceptance.assertion: The exact main-branch WGX smoke failure is reproduced and its parser/profile root cause is identified from logs and tracked inputs.
The repair accepts only the intended profile form and preserves rejection of command substitution, expansion, shell execution and unsafe assignments.
Tests cover the formerly rejected valid line plus representative unsafe profile inputs.
The WGX smoke passes on the exact PR head and subsequent main push without suppressing the workflow or marking failure as allowed.

metadata.observation: The push-only WGX smoke rejects a tracked profile assignment as unsafe; equivalent failures were observed on main before PR #215 and persisted after its byte-identical merge tree.
does_not_establish: that the profile line is safe before parser-level review
metadata.outcome: The persistent Chronik WGX smoke baseline was repaired systemically in WGX, pinned immutably into the reusable smoke workflow, and proven green on Chronik PR #216 and its subsequent main push.

validation.chronik_full_guard: 272 passed, 1 pre-existing Starlette testclient deprecation warning

findings_fixed: WGX rejected Python-like tokens inside a fully validated ANSI-C-quoted parser value.
The reusable smoke remained pinned to the pre-fix WGX commit.
Chronik used the deprecated root profile shape.
The coding-memory CLI could import itself when PYTHONPATH already contained the repository root.

acceptance_evidence.baseline-reproduced: Main run 29284458465 failed because modules/profile.bash rejected print( before parsing the safe ANSI-C-quoted assignment shape.
acceptance_evidence.safety-preserved: WGX tests reject command substitution, parameter expansion, semicolon execution, raw commands, concatenated words and malformed ANSI-C quotes; GitHub Bats and security checks passed.
acceptance_evidence.regression-tests: A Python heredoc with import/try/print/except is accepted as quoted data; five representative unsafe forms remain rejected.
acceptance_evidence.main-green: Chronik exact PR head 051417cca806bef62618bde89d897958cba39f41 and main merge faa5d2d243112d9f85f459ca92a4bafb293e782e both have successful WGX smoke and guard runs.
